creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to tkato432 from comment #2)
> Created attachment 145255 [details]
> print_typetools.diff
> 
> A version available from upstream has been continuously improved. On the
> other hand, a version bundled with TeXlive seems pretty old.
> 
> TeXlive version should be unbundled and replaced with this port unless
> there are some unresolvable technical problems IMHO. Probably TeXlive
> maintainer should take on responsiblity for making a decision which one
> to keep, though.

I understand, I've added hrs@ as CC to this bug report so he can take a look.

> 
> For the present, package building with TeXlive components would be fixed
> by this patch.

In the while I'll test and then commit this patch.

Thanks for your effort.
